content: Live proctoring (webcam/behavior monitoring), AI cheat-detection, and browser lockdown are high-complexity, infrastructure-heavy features (video pipelines, ML models, third-party services) that are explicitly out of scope for small/assessment-grade exam systems. Question banks with import/export and rich media authoring add significant CRUD/UI surface without validating the core exam-delivery value. Simpler integrity levers (single attempt, server-side timer, class-scoped visibility) deliver most of the needed trust at a fraction of the cost.
